---
name: Skill improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to a skill, its references, or its triggers.
labels: enhancement
---

## Area

Name the skill, reference file, or eval fixture.

## Problem

Describe the gap in current guidance.

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the change you want.

## Source Or Proof

Link source material, examples, playtest notes, or prior art.

## Out Of Scope

Name what this request should not change.
